name: MeshCore USB Command Profile
description: Canned serial commands for common device actions. Connect a compatible device, then click a button to send the configured command sequence.

actions.label: Request Status
actions.description: Ask the connected device for a current status report.

actions.label: Read Version
actions.description: Request firmware version and device metadata.

actions.label: Reboot Device
actions.description: Send a reboot command to the connected device. Use carefully.
actions.confirmMessage: Send a reboot command to the connected device?
